notes: Hand-written test cases with human-verified correct answers. This is the answer key the eval engine checks against. Verified working as of the CI re-run test.

test_cases.input: I was charged twice for my subscription this month, please refund the duplicate charge.
test_cases.expected_summary: Customer reports a duplicate subscription charge and requests a refund.

test_cases.input: The app crashes every time I try to upload a photo larger than 5MB.
test_cases.expected_summary: App crashes when uploading photos larger than 5MB.

test_cases.input: I can't log into my account, it says my password is wrong even after resetting it.
test_cases.expected_summary: Customer cannot log in despite resetting their password.

test_cases.input: Just wanted to say I really love the new dashboard redesign, great job team!
test_cases.expected_summary: Customer praises the new dashboard redesign.
test_cases.notes: No issue at all, should fall into general.

test_cases.input: My invoice shows the wrong plan tier and now I can't access features I'm paying for.
test_cases.expected_summary: Invoice shows the wrong plan tier, blocking access to paid features.
test_cases.notes: Could be misread as technical (access issue) but root cause is billing/invoice.

test_cases.input: kinda annoyed, app keeps logging me out randomly, anyone else having this issue???
test_cases.expected_summary: App randomly logs the user out unexpectedly.
test_cases.notes: Casual tone, no punctuation, could be confused with account category since it mentions logging out.
Extremely short, near-empty email. Edge case for minimal input.

test_cases.input: Bonjour, je n'arrive pas a me connecter a mon compte malgre plusieurs tentatives.
test_cases.expected_summary: Customer cannot log into their account despite multiple attempts.
test_cases.notes: Non-English input (French). Tests whether the model handles other languages correctly.

test_cases.input: Oh great, ANOTHER bug. Cool. Love how the export button does literally nothing when I click it.
test_cases.expected_summary: The export button does not work when clicked.
test_cases.notes: Sarcastic tone. Tests whether sarcasm confuses sentiment/category detection.

test_cases.input: I want to update my billing address and also my password, both are out of date.
test_cases.expected_summary: Customer wants to update their billing address and password.
test_cases.notes: Spans two categories (billing + account). Labeled billing as the primary intent, but flagged as ambiguous.
